So after deleting Bernard, the remaining penguins are Louis, Vincent, and Gwen. Now, we need to count how many of these are less than 10 years old. Let me check each one: - Louis is 7 years old, which is less than 10. - Vincent is 9 years old, which is also less than 10. - Gwen is 8 years old, also less than 10. So all three remaining penguins are less than 10 years old. Therefore, the answer should be 3, which corresponds to option (C). Let me double-check to make sure I didn't make a mistake.
